title: Marketplace Manager - Dove India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Dove India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Dove India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dove India:
Dove India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India!
